description: Fetch YouTube homepage video feed as a trending substitute. Since the dedicated Trending page (/feed/trending) is unavailable in some regions, this command extracts ranked video recommendations from the homepage. Returns video title, channel, view count, publish time, duration, and link. Supports tab filtering (全部/音乐/直播/播客/游戏/最近上传/发现新视频). No authentication required.

parameters.name: tab
parameters.description: Homepage tab to fetch: 全部 (default), 音乐, 直播, 播客, 游戏, 最近上传, 发现新视频
